title: Automatic CLSID Handling
text: Automatic CLSID Handling Determines whether automatic CLSID handling is used. If true , the CLSID property is not available, because you do not need to specify a CLID. If false , enter the name of the COM CLSID in the CLSID field. Applies To Signature Implementation Related Links CLSID Internal class ID of the COM component. It is automatically provided when the ProgID is selected. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
